violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

(Potatoes (homefries)), which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
Inspector observed spray can of rodenticide. PIC informed to remove chemicals from establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of (PIC), (Homefries) was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The presence of (rodents ) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings in kitchen and front counter area and burrows near dumpster area ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

The dumpster and grease trap outside is located on (grass and soil). The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The floors in kitchen area under 3 bay sink and equipment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC called for service and informed to sanitize in 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Onions were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Various foods located in reach-in freezers, were uncovered and unprotected from contamination. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2024
Observed walk in freezer to have an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024

Observed hand wash sink to be held together with tape. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2024
